reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We’re genuinely sorry about the delay in your order, the incorrect beverage served, and the way the situation was handled. That experience is not acceptable to us, and we take feedback about both service and behaviour very seriously.
We are reviewing this internally to understand what went wrong. If you’re willing, please DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in, and our team will connect with you directly.
